channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Capcom's Dragon's Dogma 2 Achieves Stable 30fps on Switch 2 with RE Engine
item.description: Capcom's Dragon's Dogma 2, which faced significant performance issues on its initial release across multiple platforms, is set to launch on the Nintendo Switch 2 on October 9, 2026. Producer Naoto Oya...

item.title: Brandon, Man., Monitors Floodwaters After River Crests
item.description: Water levels in the Assiniboine River are beginning to decline in Brandon, Manitoba, following a peak earlier this week. According to a city release, levels have dropped by approximately three inches ...

item.title: Internal TMC Conflict: Rebel Faction Demands Abhishek's Removal to Reunite Party
item.description: The Trinamool Congress (TMC) is facing a severe internal crisis as a faction led by Ritabrata Banerjee demands the removal of Abhishek Banerjee, Mamata Banerjee's nephew, to reunite the party. Veteran...

item.title: AFL Tribunal Downgrades Collingwood Defender Billy Frampton's Suspension to Fine
item.description: Collingwood defender Billy Frampton has had his suspension for rough conduct reduced to a fine by the AFL tribunal, allowing him to play against Carlton. Initially sanctioned for a heavy tackle on Nor...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Returns Home After Self-Deportation, Shares Life Challenges and Regrets
item.description: Lilian, a Kenyan woman who self-deported from the US, returned home after years abroad, sharing her experiences of rebuilding her life in Kenya. She explained that her decision to come back was influe...

item.title: Scientific research into human hibernation for space exploration and medical applications
item.description: The article explores the scientific investigation into inducing a hibernation-like state in humans to address challenges of long-duration space travel. Researchers are examining how reducing metabolic...

item.title: Bomb Disposal Officer Killed in IED Attack in Peshawar's Hassan Khel Subdivision
item.description: A member of the Bomb Disposal Unit (BDU) of the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) police was martyred while defusing an improvised explosive device (IED) at an abandoned police post in Peshawar’s Hassan Khel su...

item.title: Sahel Military Governments Face Rising Insurgency While Tightening Restrictions on Civilians and Opposition Voices
item.description: A new report from the Africa Center for Strategic Studies says the security situation across Mali, Burkina Faso and Niger has become much worse since military juntas took power, even though they justi...

item.title: Australia launches new AI governance framework under PM&C
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has announced the establishment of a dedicated Artificial Intelligence Office within the Department of Prime Minister and Cabinet (PM&C), positioning Australia as a glo...

item.title: Kemi Badenoch Purges Tory MPs Who Support Climate Action and ECHR Membership
item.description: Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch has intensified her ideological purge of the party, targeting MPs who support net zero targets and European Court of Human Rights (ECHR) membership. The move follows ...

item.title: WD-Black SN8100 2TB Gen 5 SSD Offers High Read Speeds at Competitive Price
item.description: The WD-Black SN8100 2TB Gen 5 SSD is a high-performance storage solution that delivers exceptional read speeds of 14,900 MB/s, making it ideal for data-intensive tasks such as video editing, 4K render...

item.title: Iran's Potential Closure of Bab el-Mandeb Strait Threatens Global Oil Prices and Trade
item.description: The article discusses Iran's strategic move to leverage Yemen's Houthi allies to threaten the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, a critical waterway for global oil exports and shipping. Analysts warn that closing ...

item.title: Tanzanian R&B Artist Juma Jux Enters Global Top 250, Ranks Among Africa's Top Digital Artists
item.description: Tanzanian R&B star Juma Jux has achieved a significant milestone by entering the Global Digital Artist Ranking, securing the 250th position worldwide with 188 points. This places him as the 16th highe...

item.title: CDC reports over 1,600 lab-confirmed cyclosporiasis cases in the US
item.description: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) has reported that lab-confirmed cases of cyclosporiasis in the United States have risen to 1,645, marking a significant increase from the previous ...

item.title: Protected Witness Details Payment for Tracking MP's Vehicle in High-Profile Murder Case
item.description: A protected witness testified in court that they were paid KSh 50,000 to trail the vehicle of former Kasipul MP Charles Ong’ondo Were on the day he was killed. The testimony, presented during the murd...

item.title: Tanzania's agricultural collaboration with AGRA boosts youth employment opportunities
item.description: The Tanzanian government is strengthening its partnership with the Alliance for a Green Revolution in Africa (AGRA) to harness agricultural potential for youth development. During the Quarter Two Join...

item.title: NASA Astronaut Anil Menon Begins 8-Month Mission to ISS with Indian Kids' Drawings
item.description: Anil Menon, a US Space Force colonel and emergency medicine physician, has launched his first space mission aboard the Soyuz MS-29 spacecraft to the International Space Station. The eight-month journe...

item.title: DHS Denies Pressuring Immigrants to Self-Deport Amid Legal Challenges
item.description: HuffPost reported on allegations that the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) pressured undocumented immigrants, including witnesses to an ICE shooting, to self-deport. The DHS denied these cla...

item.title: Former Tropical Depression Josie weakens into LPA, no direct threat to the Philippines
item.description: Humina ang Tropical Depression Josie (international name: Haishen) at naging isang low pressure area (LPA) noong hapon ng Hulyo 14, 2026, ilang oras lamang matapos itong pumasok sa Philippine Area of ...

item.title: Parent Cuts Financial Support After Years of Providing $5K Monthly to Adult Child
item.description: The article discusses a parent’s dilemma after providing over $300,000 in financial support to their adult child over five years. The parent, who has been sending monthly transfers, now faces the chal...
